title: blighia welwitschii
intro: Blighia welwitschii, also known as the monkey face fruit, is a plant species belonging to the Sapindaceae family. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin problems, due to the presence of flavonoids and saponins in its fruits and leaves. The plant is rich in health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which help in reducing the risk of chronic diseases like cancer and cardiovascular diseases. In traditional herbal medicine, Blighia welwitschii is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in the form of ointments and creams to treat skin conditions.
